description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named documentation that builds documentation on push to master or develop branches and on pull requests to those branches, but only for files in the docs and evennia/contrib directories. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a Python 3.9 matrix that checks out a specific 0.9.5 branch and the current branch, sets up Python, installs doc-building dependencies, sets up an Evennia game directory, and builds and deploys documentation if the workflow is running on the master or develop branch.
